Our Story

About Metta Growing

Rooted in the Bulkley Valley

A Passion for Growing, A Love for This Land

Metta Growing was founded by Alana Brinnen, a lifelong grower and landscaper who has called the Bulkley Valley home for years. What started as a love of gardening — of watching seeds sprout, of shaping outdoor spaces, of understanding which plants can truly thrive here — grew into a full landscaping business serving Smithers and the surrounding communities.

Alana approaches every project the way she approaches her own garden: with patience, attention, and genuine care. She knows firsthand how short and unpredictable northern BC summers can be, and she builds her garden plans around that reality. You won't find her recommending plants that won't survive your first frost.

The name "Metta Growing" reflects Alana's philosophy. Metta — a word meaning loving-kindness — captures the spirit she brings to the work. Every yard, every planter, every patch of lawn is cared for as if it were her own.

From intimate backyard transformations to commercial landscaping contracts, Metta Growing offers the personal touch of a small local business with the skill and professionalism of a seasoned pro. When you hire Metta Growing, you're not just getting a landscaping crew — you're getting a neighbour who genuinely wants your outdoor space to thrive.

5+
Years in Business
100+
Projects Completed
6
Communities Served

"I got into landscaping because I love watching things grow — and I love seeing the look on someone's face when they see what their yard can become."

— Alana Brinnen, Founder

What We Stand For

Our Core Values

Rooted Locally

We live and work in the Bulkley Valley. Every decision we make is informed by a deep understanding of this climate, this soil, and this community. We're not a franchise — we're your neighbour.

Grown with Care

We practice sustainable landscaping — using plants suited to the local climate, minimizing waste, and working in harmony with the natural environment. We think about the long-term health of your yard.

Built to Last

Whether it's a patio or a garden bed, we do it right the first time. Proper base preparation, quality materials, and attention to detail mean your investment stands up season after season.
